about.title: About TopEX
about.description: Founded in 2022 in Alexandria, TopEX aims to provide innovative technology solutions
about.text: We develop integrated ERP systems that help companies manage their business efficiently and achieve the desired digital transformation.

visionMission.missionText: Lead digital transformation and replace traditional systems

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of technology solutions to meet your business needs

product.title: TopEX ERP System
product.subtitle: Integrated enterprise resource management system built with latest technologies
product.cloudDesc: Cloud / Server based deployment with flexible hosting options and automatic backups
product.multiCompanyDesc: Support multiple companies from a single database with complete data isolation
product.multiLangDesc: Full bi-directional support for both Arabic and English interfaces with RTL/LTR switching
product.excelDesc: Seamlessly import and export data to/from Microsoft Excel with batch processing
product.reportsDesc: Advanced reporting system with customizable dashboards and real-time analytics
product.attachmentsDesc: Attach documents, images, and files to any transaction with version control
product.externalDesc: Integrate with external systems via REST API and web services
product.zakatDesc: Fully compliant with Saudi ZATCA e-invoicing regulations (Phase 2)
product.taxDesc: Integrated with Egyptian Tax Authority for real-time tax filing and compliance
product.techStack: Built with C# ASP.NET & SQL Server
product.description: Designed following all ERP standards and principles
